languages.text: Многослойный каскад когитаторных ядер выдает запредельную мощь этой аугментации.
The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.
languages.original_text: Многослойный каскад когитаторных ядер выдает запредельную мощь этой аугментации.

traits.locale_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.
The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

languages.text: 层叠嵌套的沉思者核心，足以彰显此项植入物所蕴含的非凡之力。
languages.original_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

traits.locale_text: 层叠嵌套的沉思者核心，足以彰显此项植入物所蕴含的非凡之力。

languages.text: La cascada de núcleos de cogitador superpuestos revela el descomunal poder de este aumento.
languages.original_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

traits.locale_text: La cascada de núcleos de cogitador superpuestos revela el descomunal poder de este aumento.

languages.text: L'empilement désordonné de cogitateurs révèle la puissance chaotique de cette augmentation.
languages.original_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

traits.locale_text: L'empilement désordonné de cogitateurs révèle la puissance chaotique de cette augmentation.

languages.text: Kavramsayar çekirdeklerinin çok katmanlı dizilimi, bu ogmentasyonun aşırı gücünü ortaya koyuyor.
languages.original_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

traits.locale_text: Kavramsayar çekirdeklerinin çok katmanlı dizilimi, bu ogmentasyonun aşırı gücünü ortaya koyuyor.

languages.text: Die vielschichtige Kaskade aus Cogitatorkernen offenbart die ungebändigte Macht dieser Augmentation.
languages.original_text: The multilayered cascade of cogitator cores reveals the inordinate power of this augmentation.

traits.locale_text: Die vielschichtige Kaskade aus Cogitatorkernen offenbart die ungebändigte Macht dieser Augmentation.

languages.text: 思考コアの多層構造は、この強化の異常な力を示しています。
